features: Ample Complete Kit: Package includes 12 hair sectioning clips + 3 styling combs, providing ample tools to tackle all your hair styling, sectioning, and coloring needs in one essential set

Durable & Reusable: Crafted with high-quality ABS plastic tops and stainless steel bases, these sectioning clips withstand repeated use without breakage. The sturdy construction resists corrosion and ensures long-lasting performance through countless styling sessions

12 Pcs Strong Spring Grip: Features reinforced springs that securely hold both wet and dry hair in place, preventing slippage or tangling. Say goodbye to messy hair or tangles during any styling process, ensuring your sections stay put

3 Pcs Slick Brush Set: The slick back hair brush set includes 1 x 8.86 inch bristle hair brush, 1 x 7.08 inch double sided edges brush and 1 x 8.66 inch rat tail comb, which will satisfy your daily needs. They are suitable for combing fringes, hairline, back hair or parted hair

Versatile Salon & Daily Essential: Ideal for all hair types and textures. These clips and combs are indispensable for diverse applications: salon styling (cutting, blow-drying, coloring, straightening, perming), makeup routines, facial cleansing, and everyday hairstyling at home
description: Product Description Package Includes 1 x Double sided edge brush: 18cm/7.08 inches 1 x Bristle brush: 22.5cm/8.86 inches 1 x Pin tail comb: 22cm/8.66 inches 12 x Sectioning hair clips: 10cm/3.94 inches Features: 1.Our hairdressing clips make parting, coloring, cutting, and blow-drying a breeze. Organize layers with ease while keeping the rest of your hair neatly secured. 2. The gentle grip keeps sections firmly in place while protecting delicate strands. 3. The bristle brush is suitable for combing fluffy hair. 4. Double-sided brush is perfect for combing bangs, hairline, brows, lashes, use them to help shape short and irregular hair. 5. The pin-tail comb can work with your hairdryer, help you section and separate the hair quickly.
